programmes.show_description: ...Accident? The case of Carol Hickok, who was found dead at the foot of a staircase outside her home by her 11-year-old stepson after she failed to wake him up for school. S1, Ep9
A woman sues her mother for the return of rent; her mother accuses her daughter and her boyfriend of smoking pot in her home. S18, Ep26
An 8-year-old boy is bitten by a pit bull while skateboarding on a playdate; his mother says he has recurring nightmares and sues for damages. S18, Ep27
A woman denies damaging her rental unit and insists she was the ideal tenant; Judge Judy's verdict leaves one person very happy. S18, Ep28
A woman admits she smashed a glass door down, but claims her former landlords reneged on a promise to make her home liveable. S18, Ep29
Claiming they still love each other dearly, divorcees with children fight over alleged stolen furniture; a surprise witness is called. S18, Ep30
A professional basketball player accuses a woman of exaggerating the cost of furniture he is being used for. S18, Ep31
While waiting to get a haircut, a man claims his good friend cut him with a new knife because he didn't like his jokes. S22, Ep56
A caterer says a bride tried to blackmail her by demanding money in exchange for not writing a terrible online review of her business. S22, Ep57
A woman is accused of breaking into her mother's house; she claims she lived there but wasn't allowed to have a key. S22, Ep58
A troubled teen is accused of stealing money from her grandmother after leaving her custody. S22, Ep59
A woman resorts to self-help in her efforts to financially recover from an alleged attack on her small dog. S22, Ep60
Jennifer Hyatte began her life as a bubbly blonde with a love of horses. She will spend her life in prison. Candice DeLong wants to discover the truth about Jennifer's tale. S1, Ep3
A road worker tells the tale of what happens when drivers do not see the cones. S1, Ep5/15
A 70-year-old pilot is hurled out of his glider after a mid-air collision. S1, Ep6/15
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A woman accuses her fiancé's father of suing her out of spite because he doesn't get to see his granddaughter as much as he'd like to. S22, Ep26
A restraining order, slashed tires and alleged theft come into play when ex friends call it quits. S22, Ep27
When a woman's vehicle is repossessed, she tells the car salesman's wife that he made inappropriate passes at her. S22, Ep28
The Judge dispenses wise advice to a teen who is allegedly hanging out with pot-smoking, drinking friends; he is sued for damages from an icy-road crash. S22, Ep29
Two women are caught on video chasing a man down in his place of business after he repossessed the car they bought. S24, Ep165
A young mother confides in her landlord when things get rough with her live-in lover; he denies any illegal activity. S24, Ep166
A man and woman claim their landlord blames them for the loss of his daughter to social services; they say he then called DCS on them. S24, Ep167
After a young woman witnesses the murder of her pet chickens by a neighbour's Husky, she draws a gun and kills the animal; neighbours deny it's their dog. S24, Ep168
A 13-year-old boy is accused of attacking a 10-year-old and breaking his arm after throwing him to the ground; children take the stand to defend themselves. S18, Ep234
Former high school friends move into a small apartment and end up fighting over pets, girlfriends, and property damage. S18, Ep235
A man claims his former landlords stole his property and harassed him; they say he abandoned the property. S18, Ep236
A property owner is shocked to discover that not 12 but 24 vacationers will be taking over his rental property; he cuts their trip short. S22, Ep61
A mother sues the father of five of her children for an unpaid ambulance bill after one of their teenagers is in an accident. S22, Ep62
A woman defends her actions after charges she filed against an ex-lover cause him to be removed from his own home. S22, Ep63
A woman is hospitalized for a month after being repeatedly stabbed during a heated argument with her ex-girlfriend's sister. S22, Ep64
The Judge questions a pregnant woman's need to bring a concealed weapon to a meeting with her ex-girlfriend. S22, Ep65
While riding her scooter with a dog on either side, a woman claims the yapping of a neighbour's small Shihpoo caused her to fall. S22, Ep66
The Judge admonishes a young woman for sizing up a mechanic based on how nice he is; she sues him for allegedly substandard work, fraud and negligence. S22, Ep67
A woman claims she was forced to move out of her boyfriend's home because of the constant harassment by two of his ex-wives. S24, Ep181
When a man passes away, his family contests and nullifies his recent wedding and sues his partner for allegedly stolen property. S24, Ep182
A businessman is left holding a 36-month lease when his assistant returns to her native country; a friend steps in but is sued for alleged car damage. S24, Ep183
A landlord allegedly goes off on a frightened mother and child who quickly move out; the landlord claims they left lice and bedbugs behind. S24, Ep184
Susan Waring, a vulnerable woman from the UK, vanished in 2019. Her partner Alan became the prime suspect in a chilling case of suspicion and fear. S1, Ep7
In December 2000, Mike Williams headed out onto the lake to hunt for ducks and never returned. It was believed he drowned and was eaten by alligators. S1, Ep7
Rainy and cold weather not only postponed a fall harvest in Sullivan, Indiana, but also the discovery of a body in a cornfield. S3, Ep10
Nurse Beverley Allitt, the 'Angel of Death,' murdered four children and harmed nine others at Grantham Hospital in 1991, driven by a desperate need for attention. S3, Ep7
In 1995 in Beaumont, Texas, the parents of Catherine Edwards find her body in her bathroom. The killer evades justice, that is, until forensic science catches up with him. S5, Ep10

A woman claims her ex-lover asked her to prostitute herself and then stranded her when she refused; she accuses her ex-lover's friend of assault at a nightclub. S16, Ep42
Belinda Van Krevel is a powerful woman. She has never spoken publicly about her case before. When Belinda tells her story to Candice DeLong, it shocks her to her core. S1, Ep4
A farmer is speared by his own tractor, and a climber falls from a sheer rock face. S1, Ep7/15
A display at an air show goes horribly wrong, and CCTV records a mysterious explosion. S1, Ep8/15
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A woman wants he ex-fiancé to pay for not only a credit card bill but the fireplace they once used in their shared home. S22, Ep33
Neighbours disagree completely as to the terms of breeding and stud fees after their beloved pets allegedly hook up and start a family. S22, Ep34
Passionate about a land purchase, a man claims the seller profited from his hard labour then sold the property for a huge profit. S22, Ep35
A man says his roommate broke the lock on his door four times; she claims he assaulted her as she tried to climb in a window. S22, Ep36
The Judge is not surprised when a crazy living arrangement does not work out; ex-lovers are left fighting over stolen property and tow fees. S24, Ep169
A man gives his ex-wife a car for his younger daughter; she survives a head-on collision in the vehicle but refuses to give him the insurance payout. S24, Ep170
A woman, not quite ready for a break up, allegedly keys her ex-lover's car and sprays his home with ketchup; anger management classes are required. S24, Ep171
Sisters pull together to pay for their father's funeral only to be pulled apart by life insurance delays; the Judge takes the insurance company to task. S24, Ep172
After meeting in a sober living environment, two women decide to become roommates and fight over rent, damaged property and an expensive bed. S18, Ep237
Half-brothers fight over the cost of a funeral, heavy drinking in Las Vegas and dental work as a result of a fight. S18, Ep238
Blood stain removal and vet bills are disputed when a Pit Bull, described as 'gentle' by his owner, allegedly attacks a woman's Pomeranian. S18, Ep239
As a good deed, a woman takes in her nephew's homeless friend who turns out to be more than she bargained for. S22, Ep68
After a break-up, a woman claims her ex-lover offered to pay all of her moving expenses from Texas to Minnesota. S22, Ep69
When a man decides to hang out with friends instead of his live-in lover, their relationship comes to an abrupt end; she accuses him of vandalizing her car. S22, Ep70
A married couple and their four children are accused of trashing a family member's house after an eight-year rental. S22, Ep71
A woman sues her business partner for the value of her pants inventory; her partner says she did all the work. S22, Ep72
A woman sues her stepdaughter for the return of her Pomeranian puppy because she fears the animal is being abused. S22, Ep73
A man accuses his Ex girlfriend of purposefully breaking his TV during an argument; she says she was mad that he ate fast food that allegedly upsets his stomach. S22, Ep74
A popular social media personality invests in a candy company, but the minute he begins promotions, his business partner allegedly goes missing. S24, Ep185
In a child custody tug-of-war, a woman ignores the father of her child's rights and tries to take their teen son. S24, Ep186
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S24, Ep187

In the UK, Faye believes she has the man of her dreams, until signs of abuse emerge. Her family discovers bruises and a dark reality, leading to a tragedy. S1, Ep8
Voncile Smith lived in a rural but wealthy neighbourhood in Pensacola with two of her sons, Richard and John, and assets worth over $1 million dollars. In 2015, their bodies are found. S1, Ep8
A loving father vanishes on a hunting trip in the Florida panhandle as unusual winter weather hampers the efforts of search and rescue. S3, Ep11
In 2006, Sana Ali was stabbed over 40 times at her Stockport home - she was pregnant at the time. SIO Jane Antrobus soon learned of her husband's affair with Harmohinder Sanghera. S2, Ep10
